# Parro

> AI Live Guide for hands-on training. Parro turns recorded software workflows into step-by-step interactive manuals and live guidance.

Parro is a B2B AI Live Guide for hands-on software training and classes. Instructors and teams can record a workflow with a Chrome extension, let AI generate step-by-step explanations, and share the finished guide as a link. Learners can follow the guide in an interactive player without installing a separate app.

## Key pages

- [Service overview](/landingpage): product features, pricing, and FAQ
- [Login](/auth/login): service login
- [Sign up](/auth/signup): start for free

## Legal

- [Privacy policy](/legal/privacy)
- [Terms of service](/legal/terms)

## Service information

- Target users: B2B customer support, SaaS onboarding, corporate training, and hands-on class operators
- Language: Korean (ko-KR)
- Category: AI Live Guide, interactive manuals, hands-on training
- Tech: Next.js, Supabase, AI generation
